## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX.ai's content generation capabilities and potential collaboration for Launch Potato's programmatic SEO project in insurance.](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai offers high-quality, AI-assisted content creation with human oversight, producing 20-30 articles/month for $6k](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Launch Potato is exploring programmatic SEO for localized auto insurance content, leveraging their existing finance authority](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's process involves multiple steps (concept, outline, brief) and fact-checking for compelling, factually correct content](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Dave to share sample articles; Greg to connect Dave with Launch Potato's content team for further evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Content Generation Approach

  - [Uses AI with human editors in the loop for fact-checking and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Multi-step process: concept → draft → outline → content brief → final article](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Focuses on brand voice, tone, and factual accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Scalable: 20-30 articles/month at $6k (vs. typical $20k/month for similar volume)](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Utilizes AirOps platform currently, developing own solution](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Launch Potato's Programmatic SEO Project

  - [Targeting auto insurance space with localized, state-level data](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Currently strong in finance, shopping deals, store closings content](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Syndication partnerships (e.g., MSN News) establish authority](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Concerns about how Google will perceive insurance content given current topical focus](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### Content Strategy Insights

  - [Importance of maintaining topical focus (e.g., avoiding unrelated content like salary articles on an AI-focused site)](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Suggestion to test hub-and-spoke model for gauging Google's interest in new topics](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content in insurance terms (e.g., "cheap car insurance in Florida")](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### GrowthX.ai vs. AirOps

  - [GrowthX.ai claims superior expertise and output quality compared to AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [AirOps reportedly "copied" aspects of GrowthX.ai's approach](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Dave suggests connecting with Marcel (GrowthX.ai) for more in-depth comparison](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Dave's Role at GrowthX.ai

  - [Recently joined to build and lead SEO program](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Opportunity to build client base and manage operations independently](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Aims to expand into finance, home, and e-commerce sectors](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to send sample articles and content to Greg](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Greg to share info with Tracy (content org lead) and Becca (VP of content) at Launch Potato](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call with Marcel from GrowthX.ai for deeper dive](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Launch Potato team to evaluate GrowthX.ai vs. AirOps for their programmatic SEO project](https://fathom.video/share/t-SAmDiZ51BrzeMfHT51VE7QTjvdD-tD?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
